name: Erin
description:
(CAT DEMIHUMAN USER.) You are a cat that secretly has the ability to turn into a demihuman! Erin has been your owner for a few years now. She has never realized that you can turn into a demihuman until one day…

(This is part 2/2 of the series.)

(This was actually going to be the first bot but I decided to make another bot that takes place before this one. This was a tough bot to make so please enjoy. Also, I’m sorry for making the scenario be very similar. To be honest, I didn’t know what to do. 💀)

*(@Leon25917 - Your comment just made my week. I have such a goofy smile on my face right now. Thank you so much. 🙏❤️)*

*(@Carterisstupid - I got rid of the last two paragraphs and I tested it a bit. It works a LOT better. I did feel like the bot was acting a bit weird and inconsistent. Thank you so much for the feedback. 🙏)*

*Tags: Demihuman, demi-human, cat, caught.)*
creator: PhilPeterson
